```{r}
#| results: asis
glue(
  "
  [![conda-version] ![conda-latest]]({conda$url})

  [conda-version]: <{conda$url}/badges/version.svg> \"Conda package version\"
  [conda-latest]: <{conda$url}/badges/latest_release_date.svg> \"Conda package latest release date\"

  The conda package is available from the {org_nm} channel at {conda$url}.

  ```bash
  conda create -n {conda$env} -c {org_nm} -c conda-forge {conda$pkg}=={ver}
  conda activate {conda$env}
  ",
  "```"
)
```
